title: LaneShadow Font Manifest — UC-TOK-01
description: Font family metadata for Opinion (Newsreader), UI (Geist), and Instrument (JetBrains Mono). Downstream TOK-05 will bundle these as platform assets.

fonts.$comment: Navigator voice — italic-capable optical-size serif for greetings, chat responses, section headings.
Application chrome — clean geometric sans for screen titles, card titles, list rows, labels, metadata.
Numeric readout — tabular lining numerics with tnum feature for distance, duration, temperature, timestamps.
